news_results.snippet: Acupuncture outperformed sham needling in clinical and biological measures of combat-related post-traumatic stress disorder (PTSD) in veterans.
news_results.title: Acupuncture Tops Sham for Easing PTSD in Combat Veterans

news_results.snippet: Acupuncture may be clinically efficacious in combat veterans seeking treatment for posttraumatic stress disorder.
news_results.title: Acupuncture Helps Alleviate PTSD Symptoms in Combat Veterans
